name: tools with no per-rule options (vuln scanners, formatters) have no render block, since there are no options to emit
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'c=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"]; bad=c.select{|k,v| v["per_rule_options"]=="none" && v["render"]}.keys; STDERR.puts("optionless_with_render=#{bad.inspect}"); exit(bad.empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo optionless-have-no-render 1>&2
